name: Chip
description: Chip represents people using icons, labels and images.

props.name: removable
props.description: Whether to display a remove icon.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: remove
events.description: Callback to invoke when a chip is removed.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Content can easily be customized with the default slot instead of using the built-in modes.

slots.name: removeicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Remove icon click event * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ removeCallback: (event: Event) => void; /** * Remove icon keydown event * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ keydownCallback: (event: Event) => void; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom remove icon template of chip component.
